meta.title: Careers at MyHome24App – Jobs & Team
meta.description: Join MyHome24App. Explore open roles, our values, benefits and the hiring process.

hero.title: Build the next generation of home search with us
hero.subtitle: We’re looking for people who love products, take ownership, and craft great user experiences.
highlights: High bar for product, design & engineering
hero.note: Tip: You can also apply proactively if no role is a perfect match.

quickBox.title: Proactive application
quickBox.text: Didn’t find the right role? Send us a message — we’ll get back to you soon.

values.title: How we work
values.subtitle: Principles that keep us focused and shipping fast — with quality.

items.title: Clarity over complexity
items.text: We build solutions that users understand instantly.

items.title: Teamwork & ownership
items.text: We work transparently, give feedback, and take responsibility.

items.title: Learning & growth
items.text: We continuously improve product, process, and skills.

roles.title: Open roles
roles.subtitle: These are typical roles. If you’re a good fit even without a 100% match — reach out.
roles.note: We update roles regularly. Proactive applications are welcome.

items.title: Frontend Engineer (React)
items.text: Build Zillow-like UI flows: fast, clean, responsive and dark-mode-ready.

items.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Firebase)
items.text: Auth, Firestore, Functions, AppCheck — robust backends and clean data models.

items.title: Product / UX Designer
items.text: Design clear, modern flows — minimal, user-centered and measurable.

process.title: Hiring process
process.subtitle: Fast, respectful and transparent — no unnecessary rounds.

steps.title: Contact / application
steps.text: Send a short profile + links. We reply quickly.

steps.title: Mini case
steps.text: Small task or review — realistic, fair, time-boxed.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.subtitle: What we care about — may vary by role/setup.

items.q: Can I apply without perfect experience?
items.a: Yes. We value learning mindset, ownership and solid fundamentals.

items.q: How fast will I hear back?
items.a: Usually within a few business days.
Yes, many roles are remote-friendly. Details depend on the position.

bottomCta.title: Sounds good?
bottomCta.text: Send us a short message — we’d love to hear from you.
bottomCta.note: Please don’t send sensitive data. Links (portfolio/GitHub) are perfect.
